title: Scale test: Multi-gateway capacity
description:
Validate that multi-gateway scales capacity linearly.

## Test scenarios

### Capacity scaling
- 1 gateway: measure max nodes
- 2 gateways: verify ~2x capacity
- 4 gateways: verify ~4x capacity

### Coordination overhead
- Measure backbone traffic between gateways
- Verify overhead is < 5% of LoRa capacity

### Node handoff
- Simulate node movement between coverage areas
- Measure handoff latency
- Verify no packet loss during handoff

### Failure recovery
- Kill one gateway, verify nodes migrate
- Restore gateway, verify rebalancing
- Measure recovery time

## Success criteria

- Capacity scales linearly with gateway count (within 90%)
- Handoff latency < 5 seconds
- Gateway failure recovery < 30 seconds
- Coordination overhead < 5%
